response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior/staff full-stack software engineer with strong web, backend, and some embedded/low-latency systems work, but the role requires deep specialization in SoC and IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, deep-learning workload analysis, and hardware-software co-design. None of these core competencies appear in the resume. While there is some C/C++ and low-latency D experience, there is no evidence of SoC modeling, GPU architecture analysis, DNN training/inference optimization, or hardware-software co-design at the principal architect level this role demands.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (15+ years) across multiple domains
Some low-level/low-latency systems and C/C++ exposure (National Instruments, DLang async I/O)
Strong testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship discipline
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling or AI-accelerator hardware experience
No deep-learning workload, GPU architecture, or DNN optimization background
Profile is application/web-focused, not hardware-software co-design or performance architecture
